relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/Collagenase hyaluronidase aliquoting.docx
full_text:
11.3.2020

| | 
 | 
 |

Hi,

Here are the instructions:

Collagenase/Hyaluronidase Catalog # 10X Collagenase/hyaluronidase in DMEM 07912 10 mL

Thaw Collagenase/Hyaluronidase at room temperature (15 - 25°C) or overnight at 2 - 8°C (according to the instructions).
Label sterile 1.5 ml eppendorf (x 20 tubes) inside the laminar hood as --> C&H_10X_Date of aliquot_Name of the person
Aliquot 500 ul / 1.5 ml sterile eppendorf inside the laminar hood.
Store in -20 enzyme box

Please remember to paste the sticker from the original tube into aliquoting book and indicate the date of aliquot.

Thank you!

Ashwini
